intended_use: ClearRead +Confirm is intended to generate an enhanced, secondary digital radiographic image of the chest to facilitate confirmation of line/tubes. The enhanced AP or PA image of the chest provides im
intended_use_full: ClearRead +Confirm is intended to generate an enhanced, secondary digital radiographic image of the chest to facilitate confirmation of line/tubes. The enhanced AP or PA image of the chest provides improved visibility of lines and tubes. The ClearRead +Confirm image provides adjunctive information and is not a substitute for the original PA/AP image.
target_condition: Confirmation and localization of endotracheal tubes, central lines, and cardiac wires in chest radiographs
ground_truth: True anatomical locations of tubes, lines, and electrical cardiac wires
other_metrics: Statistically significant reduction in read times for localizing tubes, lines, and wires with ClearRead +Confirm; no statistically significant difference in accuracy of localization between ClearRead +Confirm and unaided reads
